variants: Fabian Steffens, a resident of Nocturne Pines, hails from Redwing Harbor, where he discovered his passion for invention. He is the author of the 'Umbrellis Matrix Guide,' an influential work within his sphere of expertise. His innovative contributions to the field garnered him the prestigious Dawnbringer Emblem, marking a significant recognition of his ability. Additionally, Fabian is an active member of the Xenon Model Makers, collaborating with fellow enthusiasts who share his love for design and creativity.

Born in Redwing Harbor, Fabian Steffens has made his home in Nocturne Pines, where he actively explores new ideas and creations. His book, the 'Umbrellis Matrix Guide,' has been well-received by peers and aspiring innovators alike. For his notable achievements, he was awarded the Dawnbringer Emblem, acknowledging his dedication to the craft. In his pursuit of shared knowledge, Fabian participates in the Xenon Model Makers, uniting with others who enjoy model making and engineering marvels.
